differentials.name: Pleomorphic adenoma of ectopic salivary tissue / of deep lobe of parotid gland
differentials.raw: Pleomorphic adenoma of ectopic salivary tissue / of deep lobe of parotid gland (common)

context: √  racemose, enhancing area along medial border of lateral pterygoid muscle Origin:   pharyngitis (most common), dental infection, parotid calculus disease, penetrating trauma √  exits pharynx at level of tonsillar fossa √  exits pharynx at piriform sinus Origin:   usually from cranial nerve X √  carotid artery pushed anteriorly √  posterior to carotid artery √  extremely vascular (numerous flow voids)
